summary: Clean-upstream toy parity rerun still failed before attribution because upstream GemmaScope-2 loader duplicated the full decoder stack on GPU; clean runner was changed to stack/load CLTs on CPU before moving the final module to GPU.

failed_job.reason: CUDA OOM in upstream load_gemma_scope_2_clt torch.stack before attribution

fix.description: Load clean CLTs on CPU, then move final non-chunk CLT module to GPU to avoid transient loader GPU peak.

rerun_job.workspace_mode: live project workspace plus explicit CLEAN_LIB_ROOT

summary: Wave 2A Phase-1 trace-batch screening completed with perfect effective baseline agreement after replacing Cardinal c0811 node failures with reruns excluding that node; proceed to Wave 2B with legacy Phase-1 default.

dirty_files: untracked generated Wave 0/1/2A scenario and fixture files

runs.notes: Original Cardinal run had 5 trace failures, all on c0811.
Failed-only Cardinal rerun used --exclude=c0811 and replaced original failed Cardinal scenarios.

decision: Keep phase1_trace_batch_policy=legacy for Wave 2B; retain cap16 as optional conservative resource candidate for later interaction testing, and cap1 as diagnostic only.
infrastructure_note: Cardinal node c0811 produced CUDA misaligned address, illegal memory access, launch failure, and CUBLAS internal errors during Phase-0/model-forward traces; reruns on c0802/c0804/c0822/c0826 succeeded, so avoid or report c0811 for exact-trace work.
